programs.title: Battle After Another
programs.desc: Pat (Leonardo DiCaprio) hides under a changed name as Bob Ferguson with his daughter Willa in a town in the desert.No one knows that in the past, this inconspicuous man was the leader of a group of revolutionaries that committed numerous acts of sabotage: his accomplices freed refugees, robbed banks and blew up government buildings.Sixteen years after the attack on the prison, the leader of the elusive gang is tracked down by his old enemy, Colonel Steven Lockjaw (Sean Penn), who was obsessed with Bob's beloved, Willy's mother.When the girl is kidnapped, her desperate father asks her former mentor (Benicio Del Toro) for help.Together they set off to search for the hostage.

programs.title: Euphoria
programs.desc: The further fate of a group of friends who left school behind and entered adulthood.The action moves forward several years.Rue (Zendaya Coleman) is no longer a lost teenager, but a person involved in the criminal world.He goes to interrogation in connection with smuggling drugs from Mexico.Cassie (Sydney Sweeney) and Maddy's (Alexa Demie) relationship has improved, but old wounds haven't healed at all.The first woman's relationship with Nate (Jacob Elordi) develops, but not towards a happy ending.The remaining characters confront their own choices, addiction and violence.They are looking for redemption and answers to the question about their place in the world.

programs.title: Rooster
programs.desc: Greg Russo (Steve Carell) has written a best-selling series of books, and readers identify him with his literary hero nicknamed Rooster.A famous writer comes to the university campus to support his daughter (Charly Clive) who is going through a marital crisis in a difficult moment.Her partner has just left her for a student, which everyone knows perfectly well.The situation is further complicated by scandals involving a woman who are the subject of gossip in the academic community.The father declares help, but his presence quickly reveals old conflicts and uncomfortable topics, instead of bringing the expected solution.

programs.title: Comeback 3
programs.desc: Valerie Cherish, a once popular television actress, rose to fame as a sitcom star.After many years, he wants to return to the small screen at all costs.He decides to take part in a new reality show.

programs.title: Miami Vice
programs.desc: Police officers Sonny Crockett and Ricardo Tubbs are assigned to a dangerous mission.They are busting a gang of drug smugglers, led by a man named Montoya.The trafficker is believed to be involved in the murder of two federal agents and the family of their informant.Crockett and Tubbs infiltrate the Montoi organization.Sonny begins an affair with Isabella, who invests the proceeds of crime in legal ventures.Crockett tries to protect his lover, having no idea what the woman actually does and what her true identity is.Meanwhile, Tubbs and his girlfriend, analyst Trudy Joplin, try to understand the activities of criminals using their own methods.Ricardo does not know that he is putting his beloved in danger.Wanting to reach the gang leader, two detectives decide to transport a load of drugs to southern Florida.Gradually, the lines between the rules of the underworld and the rule of law are blurring.

programs.title: Gaga Chromatica Ball
programs.desc: The performance of the famous singer Lady Gaga recorded in 2022 at Dodger Stadium in Los Angeles.The concert, which was part of The Chromatica Ball's tour promoting its sixth album, took place in front of an audience of 52,000.The singer performed, among others:their greatest hits, such as "Stupid Love", "Bad Romance", "Just Dance", "Poker Face", "Shallow", and "Rain On Me".The whole is complemented by songs played on the piano, amazing choreography, spectacular pyrotechnics and the artist's spectacular stylings.
